IMQService class

Class IMQService Basic abstract service (server-side) implementation

Signature:

export declare abstract class IMQService

Modifiers

Description

Property

Modifiers

Type

Description

protected

Server<any, any>

Methods

Method

Modifiers

Description

describe()

Returns service description metadata.

destroy()

Destroys this instance of service

{Promise}

publish(data)

Sends given data to service subscription channel

start()

Initializes this instance of service and starts handling request messages.

{Promise<IMessageQueue | undefined>}

stop()

Stops service from handling messages

{Promise}
